response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong technical leadership, mentoring, and distributed systems skills, he fundamentally lacks the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. His background is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for full-stack and web infrastructure, which does not align with the low-level C++ compute platform focus of this Technical Lead role.
strengths: Extensive experience in software design, architecture, and distributed systems.
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and establishing best practices.
Proven ability to own and launch large-scale projects, including a Kubernetes-based Geo-Data platform.
concerns: Critically lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience, with only brief professional exposure over 20 years ago.
Technical stack is heavily skewed towards web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than core cloud compute technologies.
Lacks recent, dedicated experience in low-level hardware architecture or core compute platform engineering.
